game.title: Phasing Puller
game.short_text: Pull blocks into blocks -- from the other side

details.title: Phasing Puller
details.description:
Make your way using a Phasing Puller!
 
By phasing through objects, this tool can pull and fasten physical objects to the bypassed item from the other side.

Despite achieving a remarkable advance in technology, the facility now appears to be forlorn. Enveloped by a desolate atmosphere, an android sets out.



Both arrow keys and WASD work simultaneously; pick and choose!







Here's a playthrough of the jam-version, found on Itch's YouTube channel:

And here's a showcase of speedrunning the jam-version, made by Weaboo Degenerate:

But wait, there's more: a complete recreation of the game in GD, made by Zejoant:


Finally, here's a full playthrough of the Casket edition of the game, made by ToasterCoder:


And in the end, you can listen to the OST on Bandcamp.I only have .zip-files available, so you'll have to extract the game from one of these.

game.title: SparkLink
game.short_text: “I feel so powerless without you…”

details.title: SparkLink
details.description:
In SparkLink you play as Robi, a robot that can only move when connected to electricity, and Sparky, a bundle of energy that can interact with machinery. 
Follow these two through their adventure as they are joined together to solve fast-paced action puzzles in a large futuristic city.
 Made in 48 hours for the GMTK 2021 
Game Jam Theme: Joined Together 
How to play: Mouse control – guide Sparky Left click – interact with objects as Sparky WAD/ZQD/Spacebar – control Robi when connected to SparkyR - restartF11 - fullscreen switching

game.title: Maze of the Mini-taur
game.short_text: Make your way through the labyrinth while you move and manipulate its very rooms. Can you escape?

details.title: Maze of the Mini-taur
details.description:
Ranked 5th in the 2021 GMTK Game Jam
Welcome to the Maze of the Mini-taur! Make your way through the labyrinth while you manipulate its very rooms. Can you escape?
In this puzzle-platformer, each level is made up of 9 joined together rooms. Shift the columns and rows of the level to separate and rejoin the various rooms, to create new (and perilous) paths for your Mini-taur to reach the exit. Good luck!
_________________________________________________
Join our Discord for updates on the game and to chat with devs/players!_________________________________________________
CONTROLS:
WASD / Arrow keys – Move and jumpLeft click – Move maze columns/rowsR – Reset levelO / P – Previous level / skip level
_________________________________________________
CREDITS:
Zachary Richman – Director, WriterLeko – ProgrammerKira – Programmer, Level DesignerFartfish – Pixel Artist, AnimatorAmorphous – Pixel Artist, AnimatorAdrian Karmanski – Music, SFX

game.title: TetherGeist
game.short_text: (GMTK Jam 2021 - Top 10 Popular Vote) Traverse a mystical world by separating and rejoining  with your ghost.

details.title: TetherGeist
details.description:
TetherGeist
TetherGeist is a puzzle-platformer created in 48 hours for GMTK Jam 2021 following the theme  "Joined Together." The Jam version received exceptionally high praise, ranking 10th (top 0.2%) based on the popular vote. Nearly a month later, the post-jam version was released with twice as many stages and many improvements to the gameplay. 
Controls
ActionKeyboardControllerJumpSpace / W / Up ArrowB Button (bottom face)LeftA / Left ArrowLeft D PadRightD / Right ArrowRight D PadSplit / RejoinJLeft Shoulder / X Button (top face)Restart LevelRStart
Join Our Discord
Come hang out with us on Discord. Ask questions. Make fun of our game (politely).
https://discord.gg/KbgvDrBbXX 
Sign Up For Our Newsletter
https://jordanottesen.com/tethergeist-email-signup
Jam Notes
"While joined with your soul, the landscape seems relatively calm, but once you separate from your soul, the land comes to life. Of course, the separation comes at a price... 

We've explored this core mechanic in many ways and are admittedly pretty happy with what we've created in these last hectic 48 hours. 

We've put our hearts and souls into this... and have sacrificed much sleep lol. Thank you so much for playing!

Jordan & Team"
Artwork was created during the Jam. 
Audio was created during the Jam with some ideation rehearsed prior.
Postmortem to follow.

Tools
Gamemaker Studio 2PhotoshopReaperfreesound.orgKenney SFXGoogle DriveDiscordZoom
Credits
Jordan Ottesen - Development, Pixel Art, SFX, Game/Level DesignJeff Smith - Development, Game/Level DesignRae Allen - Splash Art, Pixel ArtNoah Allen - Pixel ArtRussell Hodges - Soundtrack https://linktr.ee/russellhodgesmusicTyler Ottesen - Level DesignMichael Ottesen - Level Design

game.title: Ghostel
game.short_text: Clear the hostel from as much ghosts as you can.

details.title: Ghostel
details.description:
You ain't 'fraid of no ghost!

Challenge yourself in this arcade game! 
Don't let the two characters fool you. It's a single player game!
Take control of ghost hunters linked to each other with a beam capable of destroying ghosts. Don't separate them too much or the link will break!Run across the room to kill as many spirits as you can.
Compare your score with other players in the online leaderboard!
ControlsThe game can be played with the keyboard or a gamepad.
Gamepad : use the left and right stick to control each character. Press LB to trigger the current power up you may have collected.
Keyboard : use wasd/zqsd and the arrow keys to control each character. Press space to trigger the current power up you may have collected.PowerupsThere are two powerups you can collect after destroying orange ghosts:1. Time Freeze: freezes enemies for ~5 seconds to help you clear the area without danger. Display turns to black and white.2. Attraction Trap: A trap is dropped in the middle of your beam. It attracts all enemies near by and destroy them on contact. Beware: this one is a double edge sword, it may give you a lot of points but don't get in the way of enemies being attracted to the trap!
TipTry to keep the small guy on the left and the tall guy on the right
Credits - Grégory Dassibat- Julien Foucher- Jonathan Gillard- Louis Le Brun- Pierre Le Brun- Olivier Lhermite

unzip the package and run Ghostel.exe

details.title: Acid Split
details.description:
Bullet Hell Top-Down Shooter Entry for the GMTK 2021


48 Hours - 2 Man Team - Unity3D
A straight-up Bullet-Hell madness with a little twist to the formula. You control two characters stringed by a very thin and fragile link, very simple... one moves and can't shoot the other shoots but can move.
DON't GET TO FAR OR IT WILL BREAK! IF EITHER ONE DIES ITS GAME OVER!
Give a try and show yourself what you're made of, it's no walk in the park

INSTRUCTIONS 
WASD to Move
MOUSE to Aim - LEFT-CLICK to Shoot 
SPACE to Join/Split when at x20 SREAK 
SPACE to Restart after dying

Post your scores in the comments!
//noSleepTeam

game.title: Dr Baggos Super Weapon
game.short_text: Like Katamari Damacy... but with Guns!

details.title: Dr Baggos Super Weapon
details.description:
Welcome to Dr Baggos Super Weapon! It's like Katamari Damacy... but with guns!
You play as the creature developed in Dr Baggos laboratory. Your special ability? You can control weapons... with your mind! Aiding on your mission to bring the world to it's knees is your power to JOIN TOGETHER and become one with the gun (or as you will soon see... be one with dozens of firearms  at once!)
Controls: WASD or Arrows to move. Left Mouse to Shoot.
Developed for the 2021 GMTK Game Jam "Joined Together".  The game follows the theme by when you find a gun it then becomes linked to you. One gun may not seem like a big deal, but eventually you will have dozens of pistols, machine guns, and rocket launchers all joined together in unison under your control. As your arsenal gets bigger the more enemies you can take on at once... which in turn gives you even more guns to control.
Credits:
Created with Game Maker Studio 2
Programming/Design by Me
Graphics:
Majority of graphics like the tile sets and characters are mostly from Kenney's Top Down Shooter Pack - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/topdown-shooter
Weapons are from Jestan - https://jestan.itch.io/weapons-pack
Tank is from Ragewortt - https://ragewortt.itch.io/top-down-sci-fi-tanks
Sound: 
From https://freesound.org/ - specifically thanks to lemudcrab, marregheriti, superphat, jarusca, highpixel, and tonsil5.
Music:
Linear Phase by Electronic Senses | https://soundcloud.com/electronicsenses Absolom by Electronic Senses | https://soundcloud.com/electronicsenses Aura by Electronic Senses | https://soundcloud.com/electronicsensesMusic promoted by https://www.free-stock-music.comCreative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 Unportedhttps://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.en_US
Motion Blur by Nihilore - http://www.nihilore.com/synthwave
Thanks so much for playing! "N" key skips levels btw...
-SwornCoyoteDownload zip and play! Should also be playable in the itch.io app.

game.title: Word Factori
game.short_text: starting with just the letter “i”, bend, merge, rotate, and reflect to create entire words.

details.title: Word Factori
details.description:
A new & improved version of Word Factori is OUT NOW (Launched August 3 2023)! 
The new version is here on Itch AND Steam. No matter where you buy it, you will get the updated version.


The 2021 GMTK Game Jam winner, Word Factori (previously known as factori), is now a fully featured game.
Word Factori is a game about creating all the letters of the alphabet from the letter i, chaining together a system of satisfying factories to form words.

starting with the letter i, you will apply rotations, reflections, bending, and merging to craft more complex letters. create your interconnected system of factories and link them to the blue bins at the top of the screen to produce the required letter or word. 
then sit back and smile as your beautiful machines chug along.

Word Factori was originally made in 48 hours for the 2021 GMTK Game Jam, where it was selected for Mark Brown's top 20 games, and was ranked #1 by popular vote. we have since expanded the game into its current full version.


want more from Star Garden Games? 
check out Sixit, and join us on Discord & Twitter!Sixit: https://stargardengames.itch.io/sixitDiscord: https://discord.gg/qCZyTrZacJTwitter: https://twitter.com/stargardengames

resultData.title: Top&Tom - Two Bots on the Road

game.title: Top&Tom - Two Bots on the Road
game.short_text: 2 bots part on a road trip, but you can only control one of them

details.title: Top&Tom - Two Bots on the Road
details.description:
Top&Tom - Two Bots on the Road
Important Preliminary Note
The game has only been tested on screens with a 16:9 aspect ratio. Other aspect ratios may produce unexpected results.
Known Issues
It is highly probable that gamepad controls do not work in the browser version. Use mouse or keyboard instead.If you click on the sound icon (or on the "Replay Tutorial" on the title screen), the game registers a jump action. Don't be surprised. The same occurs when starting a run from the title screen.
About This Game
Tom&Top has been created during the GMTK Game Jam 2021.
You play Top and Tom, two bots that went on a road trip while being attached to one another. The twist is you can only control Top directly, but you have to help both of them continue their journey.
Requirements
Those requirements only apply to the downloadable versions of the game.
PlatformMinimum RequirementsWindowsWindows 7 (SP1+) or Windows 1032 or 64 bitsDX10 capable graphics cardmacOSmacOS High Sierra 10.13 or laterApple Silicon or Intel 64 bits processorMetal capable graphics card
Controls
Controls in Tom&Top are very easy.
Follow the tutorial at the beginning of the game to practice the different actions.
Action   KeysJumpGamepad : A (Xbox) / X (PS)Keyboard : Up arrowMouse : Left buttonRush for the groundGamepad : B (Xbox) / O (PS)Keyboard : Down arrowMouse : Right button
Indirect Control of Tom
Tom cannot be controlled directly, but you can make it avoid obstacles anyway. Jump then rush for the ground to bounce it below obstacles on its side of the road. Jump just after to bring it back to the road faster than it would be by itself.
Credits
All code and visual elements have been done by me.
Music : https://opengameart.org/content/lasso-lady-seamless-loopSound Effects : https://opengameart.org/content/8-bit-sound-effects-library

game.title: Dongle Hell
game.short_text: Before you can show your presentation you have to dongle your way from USB to SATA

details.title: Dongle Hell
details.description:
This is my entry for GMTK Game Jam 2021
DescriptionYou are about to share an important earnings report that might land you a promotion, but for some reason, the projector uses a SATA cable while your laptop only has USB ports. Luckily for you, the office has many weird dongles you can use. Find a way to convert USB into SATA so you can give the maybe most important presentation of your life.
Controls


You can drag dongles around using left mouse button.Dongles automatically connect when pushed into matching connection type.You can disconnect a dongle again using right mouse button.When you hover over a dongle, the connection type is shown in the top right corner.
CodingI did all the coding and game design.You can find me on Twitter @LeviMooreDev
Art & Audiohttps://assetstore.unity.com/packages/3d/environments/low-poly-microchip-city-17...https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/3d/environments/urban/low-poly-modular-off...https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/2d/textures-materials/sky/fantasy-skybox-f...https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/3d/characters/humanoids/humans/cube-people...https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/2d/gui/icons/simple-ui-103969https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/audio/sound-fx/universal-sound-fx-17256

game.title: Tsugite
game.short_text: Explore the joys of Japanese woodworking in this puzzle game!

details.title: Tsugite
details.description:
Tsugite is the Japanese art of woodworking. Inspired by the art of making wooden joints without screws or nails this puzzle game allows you to see if you have what it takes to be a real craftsmen.
Warning
Web version of the game might start to struggle on higher levels. Try the offline version if you have any performance issues.
Tsugite_Gamejam_V1.2 is the game as delivered during the GTK2021 jam and contains errors fixed in newer versions. If you still want to play it please read the included readme for info about issues and glitches.
Controls
- Left click Carve the last piece by clicking on it until it fits together with the rest of the pieces.
- Click and drag Rotate the camera, scroll to zoom.
- Escape Pause menu
- Scroll Zoom in/out
Quirks
The characters on the bottom left are the level code, you can use this to share randomized puzzles.
Credits
Just me, this was my first solo game jam entry I ever did.
Hope you'll enjoy it!

Feel free to share interesting level codes in the comments! It can be seen on the bottom left during gameplay.Unzip the download and run the Tsugite.exe

game.title: World Flutist
game.short_text: Shape an island's ecosystem by playing your magical flute!

details.title: World Flutist
details.description:
Hello and welcome to World Flutist!A game developed for GMTK's 2021 Game Jam.
In this game, you shape an island's ecosystem by playing your magical flute! 
Each note on your flute represents one of the five elements: Fire, Earth, Water, Wind, and Life. 
To shape the island, join together two of the notes on your flute and the resulting magical song will help bring life to the island!
Each turn, you choose a song to play.  The magical song will have an effect on the island. After that the animals will interact with each other, and their population will change according to the ecosystem.  If all goes well, the population on the island will increase.  Win Condition: 
You win the game when you have achieved full population for every animal species (represented by more than 4 icons of the species)!

Credits:
Khaze - Music, art, population mechanicsCedar - Programming, flavor text
Game Jam Theme:

    
This game highlights the "joined together" theme in several ways:
    
Mechanics: Actively joins together music and gameplay - by playing the game, you are composing a song and vice-versa.
Gameplay: The player must join together two notes on the flute to summon / conjure magical effects.
Ecosystem  management: The populations of every living creature are co-dependent  on every other population and element in the ecosystem.  In this way,  all elements of the ecosystem are joined together.

Here are all the possible magical songs (spoilers):
Summoning:
Vegetation (Water+Earth): summons vegetationInsects (Life+Earth): summons insects (eats vegetation)Fishes (Life+Water): summons fishes (eats vegetation)Birds (Life+Wind): summons birds (eats insects)Ground Animals (Life+Fire): summons ground animals (eats fishes)
 Conjuring:
Terraform (Wind+Earth): Terraforms the island for it to be able to develop a lake. The movement of the earth frees up some insects.Rain (Wind+Water): Makes a lake if there is a hole on the island. Allows birds to feed extra on bugs. Wild Fire (Wind+Fire): Covers the lake, damages ground animals and vegetation.Thunder Storm (Fire+Water): Makes a lake if there is a hole on the island. Damages birds and vegetation.Clear Skies  (Fire+Earth): Dries up the lake if there is one. Supports vegetation growth.
Default (by not selecting notes): - Does no magical actions and let the animal interactions continue
Animal interactions during the magical songs:
 Birds eats insectsGround animals eats fishesInsects and fishes eats vegetationVegetation gets nourishment from the environmentIf any of the species gets enough nourishment their population will increase!

game.title: Timeline
game.short_text: A minimalistic management game.

details.title: Timeline
details.description:
Timeline is a minimalistic management game simulating a network economy through space and time. It has been developed  with Unity for the GMTK game jam 2021. The theme of the jam was "joined together". Its gameplay rely on joining different kind of worker, ressources and locations together in a big economic network to produce more and more advanced techonologies. It proposes to illustrate how any product is the result of the joint labor of a multitude of people.

How to play
Drag the round anchor at the end of a wire on an empty place in the timeline to build a new location.Drag the round anchor at the end of a wire on an existing location to link two locations and create a new ressource.The anchor that has been placed can  be removed or moved only if no location depends on it.The wire has limited size and the number of anchor that can be linked to a location is limited so be careful to not be stucked. If you are stucked, remove the last anchors you placed to unlock the situation.Put the mouse cursor over a location to display the ressources the location produce and the ressources it can convert.

Inspiration
This game is inspired by the  woolen coat example written by Adam Smith in The Wealth of Nations :

The woolen-coat, for example… is the produce of the joint labor of a great multitude of workmen. The shepherd, the sorter of the wool, the wool-comber or carder, the dyer, the scribbler, the spinner, the weaver, the fuller, the dresser, with many others, must all join their different arts in order to complete even this homely production. How many merchants and carriers, besides, must have been employed in transporting the materials from some of those workmen to others who often live in a very distant part of the country! How much commerce and navigation in particular, how many ship-builders, sailors, sail-makers, rope-makers, must have been employed in order to bring together the different drugs made use of by the dyer, which often come from the remotest corners of the world! What a variety of labor too is necessary in order to produce the tools of the meanest of those workmen! To say nothing of such complicated machines as the ship of the sailor, the mill of the fuller, or even the loom of the weaver, let us consider only what a variety of labor is requisite in order to form that very simple machine, the shears with which the shepherd clips the wool. The miner, the builder of the furnace for smelting the ore, the feller of the timber, the burner of the charcoal to be made use of in the smeltinghouse, the brick-maker, the brick-layer, the workmen who attend the furnace, the mill-wright, the forger, the smith, must all of them join their different arts in order to produce them. 

If you enjoyed this and want to support my work, the best way to do so is by checking out my long term RPG project,  Jellyfish Egg — a deep, procedural fantasy world with full character freedom and dynamic storytelling.

details.title: Join Now!

Welcome to the workforce!
As you can well imagine, the home office life has taken its toll on us all. Thankfully, we can work past that and feel absolutely no further effects, just by staying productive and staying connected.
This is the foundation of our company: Productivity and Connectivity. And with modern technology we've become quite good at quantifying both. 
Every day you'll receive several tasks that must be completed and several meetings that must be attended. Use your mouse to interact with anything that comes your way, and to maintain focus on your meetings. Let's all work together! Everything will be fine as long as nobody breaks eye contact. Ever.

game.title: You Are a Strange World
game.short_text: You control the world, and the world controls you.

details.title: You Are a Strange World
details.description:
You live in a strange world that is influenced by, and influences, your actions, just as your brain influences your limbs and vice-versa.  We might wonder, then, whether "you" and "the world" are, in fact, one and the same.  This is true in the game as well.
An experimental platformer made in 48 hours for the 2021 GMTK Game Jam, in which the position of platforms is determined by the position of the character.  Very loosely inspired by the idea that the "self" and the external world might not be as easily separable as we normally assume.  In other words, the game world and the player character (and the real world and the real player) are inextricably "joined together" into a single entity.
Controls

←/→ or a/d to move.
↑/w/[space]/[shift] to jump.

Objective
Get to the gate to move to the next level.  There are 10 levels in total.
For an extra challenge, try to rescue all three cats.
Audio Credits
The background cricket sounds are a slight modification of this CC0 recording by hdfreema.
All other sound effects were generated using JFXR.

"The Adventure Vol.1" is a puzzle platformer game made for GMTK Game Jam 2021.
The theme for 2021 is "Joined Together", so I tried to connect inside and outside of my game.
This game uses your Windows' volume settings.
Many things in this game interact with your system's volume.

game.title: Starsnap
game.short_text: It’s a beautiful star shower, so grab a camera and immortalize the moment!

details.title: Starsnap
details.description:
It’s a beautiful star shower, so grab a camera and immortalize the moment!
Photograph the shooting stars to stop them on their tracks. Then, connect them to create constellations, and place them back in the starry night sky!

Take your time, enjoy the show, and rewrite the sky! It’s only you and the stars!

Created for GMTK Game Jam 2021

Watch as the star shower goes on. Whenever you see a group of stars cluttered close, take a photo of them to freeze them on the spot. Connect them to each other (with some having more than one connection available), and then place them back into the sky! Repeat until you’re satisfied!

Your score is based on the number of stars on each constellation, the distance between each connection, and if you managed to take a photo of special objects around them. If you’re not satisfied with your constellation, you may discard it.

When you’re done, you can even save your work as a wallpaper!

A casual night at a star shower! Photograph what you see and create constellations!Bunch of names for the constellations! Do they seem to relate to the connections you made? Neither do real ones, don’t worry! But out of almost 27,000 different names, some ought to!
Save your sky as a wallpaper! Enjoy your creation at the convenience of your computer! Of course, it also has a name!

The game is played with a mouse, using Left and Right Click!

Once you have placed down enough constellations, you can save your very own star cluster into a one-of-a-kind desktop wallpaper by pressing the Snap Wallpaper in the results screen!
On Windows, a button that allows you to Open Wallpaper Folder will appear after you snap a wallpaper. You can press it to be taken directly to it!
On other platforms, you can check the following directories to find your wallpaper:
PlatformDirectoryWindows
%userprofile%\AppData\LocalLow\Whales And Games\Starsnap
Mac OSX(Might be hidden by default)
~/Library/Application Support/Whales And Games/StarsnapLinux
$HOME/.config/unity3d/Whales And Games/Starsnap$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/unity3d/Whales And Games/Starsnap

On the Web, the wallpaper will download a few seconds after you press the button, though if you miss it, you can press the Redownload Wallpaper button to fetch it again!

Come and share your night sky or brag about the funny names of your constellations! We’re always happy to receive new starsnappers at our Discord Server!

Created, Developed & Presented by Whales and Games

Other Whales and Games Projects
Website
Twitter
Facebook
Discord Server

Development Team

Programmer – JorgeGameDev (Twitter)
Graphics Designer – Moski (Twitter)
Audio Composer - Robinaite (Twitter)

game.title: I Died in a Cave
game.short_text: A game about being one with your soul... just separated

details.title: I Died in a Cave
details.description:
Have you ever accidently fell into a cave and died? Well it turns out, it's pretty fun. In this short and sweet platforming puzzler, you travel through the underground using a plethora of acrobatic moves like crouching, sliding, wall jumping, and more. You aren't alone in this journey... well you are, but your soul is separated from your body. Linked together by a tight thread, you must use your soul to reach feat's you couldn't have otherwise. 
Moves:
Run: A and DCrouch: Left ControlSlide: Run then Left ControlJump: Space or WSoul Ability: Left Mouse ButtonCheckpoint: Slam with soul
---- Quick Note -----
We noticed that some monitors don't work very well with the game.  A fix for this would be to force windowed mode by pressing Alt + Enter. This will be remedied in a later patch.
This project was made out of passion for games by game development graduates for the 2021 GMTK game jam.

game.title: Aminus
game.short_text: Possess and link yourself to enemies to fight through endless waves

details.title: Aminus
details.description:
NOTE: There's a bug with the slow motion effect; if you get locked into slow-motion, pause and un-pause. If it happens in the tutorial, just click "Skip tutorial"
And yes, enemies that fly are supposed to travel through walls.
The core is a vessel that has the ability to connect and forge itself within other beings, taking control of them and their abilities. Fight through infinite hordes of shadow-like husks as you take control of them and use their own abilities against their own kind.
Made in 48 hours for the GMTK Game Jam with the theme "Joined Together"

Meet the husks!
If you have Windows, also try downloading the game with the link below.
Controls
WASD or Arrow Keys to move
Aim and click with your mouse to fire your chain
Click to use ability if you are connected with an enemy
Tips and Strategies
If the heart takes contact damage, the enemy you're connected to will also die
Any enemy that takes contact damage with the heart will instantly die, however the heart takes double damage than from getting shot
There is no penalty for letting the enemy you're connected to die other than not being able to attack.  You can take advantage of this and use your connected enemy as a meat shield
And, if you're planning to try to beat me, my record kill count is 80.



Credits
Programming, Art, Animation, SFX - Daniel Graves
Music - Benjamin WangCheck out the game's ost!

Awards
Pinto's Choice Indie Game of the Week Award 2021
1. Download ZIP
2. Extract ZIP to desired location
3. Open folder and open the .exe file (Do not delete, move, or modify any of the files in this folder as the game depends on it).
